---
title: "Amelia Li"
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      href: mailto:aml061@ucsd.edu
    - icon: linkedin
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/kexin-amelia-li-8a66072b9/
---

Hi, I'm Amelia Li. I'm a student at UC San Diego studying business analysis. I earned my Business Economics bachelor degree at UC Irvine. I'm excited to bring my business insights to data world!

This site shares a little about me, my resume, and some example projects built with Quarto.
